name: A Chocolate World (the impossible game)
short_description: This is 3d platformer an unusual adventure, come inside a world of chocolates and desserts where every move can be fatal each level differs from the other.. No save point the goal is to finish every level with absolute precision it's challenging it' has zero calories.... press alt+f4 to quit game
detailed_description:
Welcome to A chocolate world,
come inside a world of mouthwatering chocolates and desserts of all kind, where every move can be your last.
Every level has an unique style and differs from the other..
the goal is to finish every level with absolute precision
it's challenging
it has zero calories....

\\\\\\\\\\\\ tips /////////////////
PRESS ALT+ F4 to QUIT THE GAME
Press f11 to full screen mode
